title: Windows Rare Process Detection (Stacking)
description: Identifies rarely-seen processes on Windows endpoints. Uses the rare value hunting technique (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to surface processes that appear fewer than 3 times, which may indicate malware, attacker tools, or unauthorized software.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' | stats count as executions by 'Process Name' | sort executions | where executions < 3
